purpose: Continuously improve Touchpoints-driven strategy through structured experimentation and adaptive refinement.
core_principle: In High-Ticket strategy, small psychological shifts produce massive revenue impact.

category_1_intent_detection_tests.goal: Improve accuracy of intent stage classification.
examples: Test long-form vs short-form education content impact on validation engagement
Test gated vs ungated assets for mid-intent accounts
Test early financial ROI mention vs late-stage ROI mention
Case study before whitepaper vs whitepaper before case study
Executive article before demo invite vs demo invite before executive content
Add onboarding transparency page before demo
Add pricing explanation video before proposal
Insert objection-handling micro content between validation and meeting
Security asset early exposure vs late exposure
Transparent pricing positioning vs hidden pricing positioning

experiment_structure_template.hypothesis: If we change X, Y will improve.
experiment_structure_template.touchpoint_type: Presence / Education / Validation / Human / Conversion / Bridge
experiment_structure_template.primary_metric: Stage progression rate or velocity shift
experiment_structure_template.kill_criteria: No statistically meaningful improvement in progression

adaptive_cycle.step_1_detect: Identify stagnation or friction using measurement engine.
adaptive_cycle.step_2_prioritize: Select experiment with highest impact on bottleneck.
adaptive_cycle.step_5_scale_or_kill: Scale winning variant or terminate losing variant.

egypt.focus: Human and relationship experiments often outperform structural changes.

saudi_arabia.focus: Committee-specific and authority-driven experiments yield stronger effect.

uae.focus: Speed and clarity experiments often reduce decision time significantly.

common_experimentation_mistakes: Testing creative aesthetics without testing psychological sequence
Running too many experiments simultaneously on same account segment
Measuring CTR instead of intent progression
Stopping experiments too early in long sales cycles

learning_repository_structure.goal: Build regional strategic intelligence over time.

final_rule: Experimentation must improve certainty accumulation speed, not surface engagement.
